name: Lost in the Mirrors
short_description: Enter a mysterious mirror maze. Your cleaning job becomes a survival game as darkness falls. Mirrors reflect your fears, creating eerie illusions. Grasp your cleaning tools and wipe away stains - it's your only escape route. Clear all stains to flee this maze. Dare to face "Lost in the Mirrors"?
detailed_description:
Lost in the Mirrors

A Horror Cleaning Simulation Trapped in a Mirror Maze
You are a cleaner trapped in a mysterious maze, tasked with cleaning mirrors while searching for an escape. Can you survive this bizarre world?

Features

Intense Cleaning Experience: Polish the tainted mirrors to a shine. But beware, your reflection may not be the only thing you see.
Maze Exploration: Navigate a bewildering labyrinth where mirrors and passages are indistinguishable. Every turn might conceal a new horror.

Playtime

30-60 minutes

Grab your cleaning tools and dive into the distorted reality of "Lost in the Mirrors". Can you clean all the mirrors and escape unscathed?
